ddls:
CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "request_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the request */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office handling the request */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requester who submitted the request */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "date_closed" TEXT /* Date the request was closed */,
  "summary_of_request" TEXT /* Summary of the request */,
  "disposition_of_request" TEXT /* Outcome of the request (e.g., records provided, no records found) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (office staff) assigned to handle the request */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date by which the request will be completed */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the request was completed */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the request */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was last updated */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., FOIA, Public Inquiry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES requesters ("requester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., OLP, OASG) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the office */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the office is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the office */,
  "office_head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the office */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Description of the office and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., requester, office staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requesters" (
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requester */,
  "requester_name" TEXT /* Name of the requester */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the requester */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the requester */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the requester represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the requester */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the requester is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the requester is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the requester */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the requester is located */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the requester's record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the requester's record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being updated */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Submitted, In Review, Closed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status update */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (office staff) assigned to handle the request at this status */,
  "next_step" TEXT /* Next step or action required in the request process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_status_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_status_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is private (visible only to agency staff) or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_comments_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the document is related to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, DOCX, JPG) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the document */,
  "is_redacted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the document is redacted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_documents_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the history is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Status Update, Document Added) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the request before the change */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the request after the change */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the change is important and should be highlighted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
